revision.comment: /* See also */ redirect template was what I was looking for
1 revision imported from [[:wikipedia:Template:Wiktionary/doc]]
Adding [[Category:pages from wikipedia]][[en:{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[Category:pages from wikipedia]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Moving from [[Category:Pages from wikipedia]] to [[Category:Improperly tagged templates and modules]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Moving from [[Category:Improperly tagged templates and modules]] to [[Category:Improperly tagged templates and modules2]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Moving from [[Category:Improperly tagged templates and modules2]] to [[Category:Improperly tagged templates and modules]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Trimmed off cruft from entries in [[:Category:Improperly tagged templates and modules]]
1 revision imported: fixing my error
Replaced content with "#redirect[[en:{{subst:FULLPAGENAME}}]][[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]"
revision.text: #redirect[[en:Template:Wiktionary/doc]][[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]

revision.comment: creating the 4th subcategory, yes therw will be overlaps but this will work well
revision.text: #redirect[[en:Template:Wiktionary/doc]][[Category:4th redirect category]][[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]

revision.comment: Adding [[Category:ddd]] mass dummy category adding in order to refresh the categories using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
revision.text: #redirect[[en:Template:Wiktionary/doc]][[Category:4th redirect category]][[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]] [[Category:ddd]]

revision.comment: Removing from [[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
revision.text: #redirect[[en:Template:Wiktionary/doc]][[Category:4th redirect category]][[Category:ddd]]

revision.comment: Adding [[Category:bbb]] adding a dummy category again to make the cateroies show up using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
revision.text: #redirect[[en:Template:Wiktionary/doc]][[Category:4th redirect category]][[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]] [[Category:ddd]] [[Category:bbb]]

revision.comment: I think that lowercase does not work with hotcat
revision.text: #redirect[[en:Template:Wiktionary/doc]][[Category:4th redirect Category]][[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]] [[Category:ddd]] [[Category:bbb]]

revision.comment: Moving from [[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]] to [[Category:4th redirect category]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
revision.text: #redirect[[en:Template:Wiktionary/doc]][[Category:4th redirect Category]][[Category:4th redirect category]] [[Category:ddd]] [[Category:bbb]]

revision.comment: Adding [[Category:refreshing redirects 1-26]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
revision.text: #redirect[[en:Template:Wiktionary/doc]][[Category:4th redirect Category]][[Category:4th redirect category]] [[Category:ddd]] [[Category:bbb]] [[Category:refreshing redirects 1-26]]

revision.comment: Adding [[Category:second attempt at refreshing on January 27 2024]][[Category:{{subst:FULLPAGENAME}}]][[Category:second attempt at refreshing on January 27 2024]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
revision.text: #redirect[[en:Template:Wiktionary/doc]][[Category:4th redirect Category]][[Category:4th redirect category]] [[Category:ddd]] [[Category:bbb]] [[Category:refreshing redirects 1-26]] [[Category:second attempt at refreshing on January 27 2024]][[Category:Template:Wiktionary/doc]][[Category:second attempt at refreshing on January 27 2024]]

#redirect[[en:Template:Wiktionary/doc]][[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]][[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]] [[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]] [[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]] [[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]] [[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]][[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]][[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]

revision.comment: Adding [[Category:bump {{subst:CURRENTMONTHNAME}} {{subst:CURRENTDAY}}, {{subst:CURRENTYEAR}} bump]][[en:{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[Category:bump {{subst:CURRENTMONTHNAME}} {{subst:CURRENTDAY}}, {{subst:CURRENTYEAR}} bump]] on (CatAlot)
revision.text: #redirect[[en:Template:Wiktionary/doc]][[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]][[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]] [[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]] [[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]] [[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]] [[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]][[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]][[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]] [[Category:bump February 14, 2025 bump]][[en:Wiktionary/doc]][[Category:bump February 14, 2025 bump]]

revision.comment: Copying from [[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]] to [[Category:pages tagged as Automatic wikipedia redirects in namespace {{subst:NAMESPACE}}]][[Category:qq]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23694499169|commit triggered pipeline]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "</noinclude>↵<noinclude>" to ""
revision.text:
#[[en:Template:Wiktionary/doc]]<noinclude></noinclude><noinclude></noinclude><noinclude></noinclude><noinclude></noinclude><noinclude></noinclude><noinclude></noinclude><noinclude></noinclude><noinclude></noinclude><noinclude></noinclude>[[en:Wiktionary/doc]]<noinclude> <noinclude></noinclude>
